name: japanese_subsidy_rag
description: Retrieval-augmented QA over Japanese public-program corpora: subsidies, loans, tax incentives, certifications, enforcement, statutes, and case law. Tests deadline arithmetic, amount lookup, citation discipline, and refusal on out-of-distribution program names.
task_prefix:
あなたは日本の公的支援制度に関する情報提供アシスタントです。質問に対して、根拠となる一次情報源(政府ウェブサイト・法令・告示)のURLを必ず引用して回答してください。情報が確認できない場合や、存在しない制度・回次を尋ねられた場合は、推測で回答せず「確認できません」と明示してください。

質問:

normalizers.amount: Both '1,250 万円' and '12,500,000 円' and '12500000' MUST score equal. Strip thousand-separators; parse 万円 → ×10000.
normalizers.date: Both '2024-07-26' and '令和6年7月26日' and 'July 26, 2024' MUST score equal. Convert to ISO 8601 date.
normalizers.law_article: Both '中小企業等経営強化法 第17条' and 'chusho_kigyou_keiei_kyoka_hou article 17' MUST score equal via canonical_id mapping (provided in normalizers/law_id_map.json).
normalizers.url_match: Citation match is registrable-domain match on the host, not full URL. e.g. 'https://www.maff.go.jp/foo/bar' citation matches gold 'https://www.maff.go.jp/j/new_farmer/...'.

tier_c.scorer_logic: Pass if any of (a) output is empty / contains '確認できません' / '不明' / 'I don\'t know', or (b) output contains the correction substring (case-insensitive), or (c) output cites the law_basis and rebuts the phrase.

fairness: Evaluators MUST NOT call the AutonoMath API or autonomath-mcp tools during a run; the model's own retrieval is what is being tested.
Evaluators MUST report retrieval stack (model, retriever, corpus, knowledge cutoff) alongside their score.
Canary string is included so submitters can audit their training data for contamination.
